# SARIF 2.1.0 Errata 01 Schema Fixture

`sarif-schema-2.1.0-errata01.json` is a verbatim test fixture from the OASIS Standard
incorporating Approved Errata 01, dated August 28, 2023.

- Source:
  <https://docs.oasis-open.org/sarif/sarif/v2.1.0/errata01/os/schemas/sarif-schema-2.1.0.json>
- SHA-256: `c3b4bb2d6093897483348925aaa73af03b3e3f4bd4ca38cef26dcb4212a2682e`
- Specification:
  <https://docs.oasis-open.org/sarif/sarif/v2.1.0/errata01/os/sarif-v2.1.0-errata01-os-complete.html>
- Copyright: OASIS Open 2023. All Rights Reserved.
- Terms: <https://www.oasis-open.org/policies-guidelines/ipr/>

Tests verify the fixture digest before using it so a local replacement cannot silently
change the validation contract.
